title: The Floating Fortress
description: Without warning, the sky darkens. A fortress the size of a mountain descends from the clouds, casting its shadow across the kingdom. Panic spreads as people flee in every direction. Whatever happened to the King suddenly seems insignificant.

options.title: Defend the Kingdom
options.description: Lead the people to safety and organize a desperate defense against the colossal fortress.
options.result: The alliances and loyalties formed along your journey answer your call. A frightened kingdom becomes a united defense.
options.locked_reason: You did not build the trust or alliances required to rally the kingdom.

options.title: Claim the Fortress
options.description: If such power exists, it should belong to you. Board the fortress and seize control.
options.result: Your earlier defiance prepared you to seize power rather than ask for it. The fortress becomes the throne you chose for yourself.
options.locked_reason: Your path never established the ambition or authority needed to claim the fortress.

options.title: Loot the Chaos
options.description: While everyone else focuses on survival, you quietly gather whatever treasures have been abandoned.
options.result: You recognize the opportunities hidden inside disaster. By the time order returns, the abandoned wealth has already changed hands.
options.locked_reason: Your earlier choices did not provide the contacts or information needed to profit from the chaos.
